final:
module counter_4bit(
  input clk,
  input reset,
  output reg [3:0] count_out
);

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if(reset) begin
      count_out <= 4'b0;
    end else begin
      count_out <= count_out + 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
